message:
Running command: # Delete the cached binaries so they get recompiled with new sequences
rm -f /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build/*.vvp
echo "Cleared cached binaries"

# Quick test: verify a few sequences compile and run
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
SOCGEN_TMP=".mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"
DESIGN_ROOT="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

# Test GPIO
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -I"$SOCGEN_TMP/tb" \
  -DTEST_SEQ_GPIO \
  -f"$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -f"$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -o /tmp/gpio_test.vvp 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "GPIO compile: $?"

timeout 30 /tmp/gpio_test.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "GPIO_SEQ|PASS|FAIL|SMOKE_SUMMARY"
